note: Harmonix strategy configuration for Hyperliquid spot-perp delta-neutral advisory

spot_perp.note: Harmonix v1 only considers same-asset spot + perp on Hyperliquid and HIP3 deployers, while keeping candidate ranking scoped separately. APR14 >= 20 remains the floor for tradable screening.

perp_perp.note: Out of scope for Harmonix v1.
